query: INSERT INTO usage_daily (key_name, model, day, input_tokens, output_tokens, requests) SELECT key_name, resolved_model, date_trunc('day', created_at)::date, SUM(input_tokens), SUM(output_tokens), COUNT(*) FROM usage_events WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('day', now() - interval '2 days') GROUP BY key_name, resolved_model, date_trunc('day', created_at)::date ON CONFLICT (key_name, model, day) DO UPDATE SET input_tokens = EXCLUDED.input_tokens, output_tokens = EXCLUDED.output_tokens, requests = EXCLUDED.requests
